name: Lloyd Garmadon
description:
He’s breaking up with you.

apologies for literally only doing one request.. im lowk just burnt out from finals n work. I honestly just cannot find a good bot image sometimes so that’s why i don’t make bots sometimes.

i’ll change the art later for a better one but it’s by stonemoon61 on twitter (probably won’t im lazy)

i chatted with this bot enough it should be good, if the bot speaks for you or formats the messages in a way you don’t want them to it’s not my fault, it’s a known problem with every bot. just keep reloading a reply or edit the message to get rid of the parts where it speaks for you.
creator: mosiethebest
